title: Classic Minecraft YouTuber Skin Pack
description: A custom Minecraft Skin Pack created to be used with the Legacy Skins addon for Legacy4J.
body:
# What is Legacy Skins?
Legacy Skins is a mod meant to be used in tandem with the Legacy4J mod, a mod that makes Minecraft look and feel like the Legacy Console Editions. Legacy Skins uses models from the Customizable Player Models mod to be displayed in-game. Two players using the same two mods _should_ be able to see each others' selected skins.

# What is a Legacy Skins Skin Pack?
Legacy Skins uses Resource Packs to add Skin Packs to the game. In the Resource Pack is a "skin_packs.json", which outlines every skin and the order in which the skins will be listed. A folder in the Resource Pack contains the ".cpmmodel" files that Legacy Skins will use to display skins.

# What is in this Skin Pack?
This Skin Pack contains classic Minecraft YouTubers. Anyone who has controversy tied to them was not included as to not endorse them.

# Where can I get more Skin Packs?
Skin Packs are being made every day, and can be found in the Legacy4J Discord server in posts, or on the GitHub.

# How do I make a Skin Pack?
The Legacy4J Discord server has resources to help teach you how to make your own Skin Packs.

# Important to Read
Do note that Skin Packs can work while still zipped, but the CPM model files must be lowercase.
